---
title: "Data / Inputs"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
**What the project consumes as input** — datasets, files, APIs, configuration,
or anything else it depends on from the outside world. Delete this section if
the project doesn't have meaningful inputs to describe.
:::

<!--
prompt:
  - What inputs does this project rely on (data, files, services, secrets)?
  - Where do they come from, and who owns them?
  - What does the input look like in shape, size, and quality?
  - Are there licensing, privacy, or access constraints a reader should know?
-->
